; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-18
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&11179472971324505115&~
                function onHasRootDocumentChanged() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&11179472971324505115&~.~&13460454915767836648&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&11179472971324505115&~.~&13460454915767836648&~ && ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&12478890327260912430&~ !== 2) {
                            ~&254547437090201330&~.~&254547437090201330&~?.~&7713518575607937&~();
                            ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&12478890327260912430&~ = 2;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
